workerInput.instructions: Create a NEW test file at `packages/agora-cli/test/sync.test.ts` that unit-tests the `runSync` function exported from `packages/agora-cli/src/sync.ts`. Cover both the dry-run path (no side effects) and the normal register/iterate path. Create ONLY that one new file; modify nothing else; then stop.

Create a NEW test file at `packages/agora-client/test/errors.test.ts` that unit-tests the error class exported from `packages/agora-client/src/errors.ts`. Read that source file (present in your workspace) to learn the exact class name and constructor shape. Use vitest: `import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'`. Match the style of the existing test at `packages/agora-client/test/secret-ttl.test.ts` (also in your workspace). Assert: the formatted error message, the `.name` property, and that the instance is `instanceof Error`. Create ONLY that one new file; modify nothing else; then stop.

In `packages/agora-client/src/dispatch.ts` (present in your workspace) there is a cast of the form `(client.storage as unknown as { rootUri?: string }).rootUri` (near line 216). Replace this `as unknown as ...` cast with a small, well-named local type guard (e.g. a `hasRootUri(x): x is { rootUri: string }` helper) or a narrow interface, so the access is type-safe WITHOUT `as unknown`. Preserve the exact runtime behaviour, including the `?? ''` fallback. Edit ONLY `packages/agora-client/src/dispatch.ts`; modify nothing else; then stop.

In `packages/agora-cli/src/manifest-parser.ts` (present in your workspace) there are three `as unknown[]` casts in the YAML iteration loops (near lines 44, 58, 76 — over `capabilities`, `subagents`, and `envs`). Replace each with a typed iteration backed by a small type guard (e.g. an `asArray(x): unknown[]` or per-field narrowing helper) so the loops are type-safe WITHOUT `as unknown[]`. Preserve the exact runtime behaviour, including the `?? []` fallbacks. Edit ONLY `packages/agora-cli/src/manifest-parser.ts`; modify nothing else; then stop.
